name: vibefox-for-vscode
description: Speak your prompt (Chinese-first) and insert the transcription into Claude Code, Cline, Copilot Chat, or the active editor.

commands.title: VibeFox: Toggle Voice Recording / 开始·停止录音
VibeFox: Cancel Recording / 取消录音
VibeFox: Set License Key / 设置授权密钥
VibeFox: Set API Key / 设置 API 密钥
VibeFox: Clear API Key / 清除 API 密钥
VibeFox: Diagnose Audio Input / 诊断麦克风输入

enumDescriptions: Use Cloudflare Workers AI (default free/hosted backend)
Use Groq Whisper API (requires Groq API Key)
Use OpenAI Whisper API (requires OpenAI API Key)
Use Alibaba Cloud DashScope Qwen-Audio API (requires Aliyun API Key)
Use a custom HTTP POST endpoint (e.g. local SenseVoice or custom proxy)
vibefox.apiProvider.markdownDescription: Choose the API provider to use for speech-to-text transcription.

vibefox.customEndpoint.markdownDescription: The HTTP POST API endpoint to use when `vibefox.apiProvider` is set to `custom` (e.g. `http://localhost:8000/transcribe`). Should accept JSON `{ audio: "base64", language: "zh", keywords: [...] }` and return JSON `{ text: "..." }`.

vibefox.endpoint.markdownDescription: Cloudflare Worker base URL, e.g. `https://vibe-voice-worker.<account>.workers.dev` (no trailing slash).

vibefox.language.markdownDescription: ISO-639-1 language passed explicitly to Whisper (bypasses auto-detection latency). Default `zh`.

vibefox.maxRecordSeconds.markdownDescription: Auto-stop recording after this many seconds (Note: Cloudflare Workers AI may have hard limits on extremely long payloads, e.g. >120s).

enumDescriptions: Active editor cursor → active terminal → agent chat input → clipboard fallback
Always insert at the active editor cursor
Always send to the active terminal (no newline)
Always copy to clipboard and notify
Always pre-fill the active Copilot/Agent chat panel input box
vibefox.insertTarget.markdownDescription: Where to insert the transcribed text. `auto` will detect active editor or terminal, then fallback to chat/clipboard.

vibefox.ffmpegPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the `ffmpeg` binary. Leave empty to use `ffmpeg` from PATH.

vibefox.audioDevice.markdownDescription: Input device override. macOS avfoundation index (e.g. `:0`), Windows dshow name (e.g. `audio=Microphone (USB)`), Linux pulse source. Empty = platform default.

vibefox.contextHint.markdownDescription: Extract identifiers from the active editor + recent filenames and send them as a vocabulary hint (Whisper `initial_prompt`) so code terms transcribe accurately.

vibefox.vadEnabled.markdownDescription: Enable client-side Voice Activity Detection (VAD) to split audio on silence and transcribe incrementally.

vibefox.vadSilenceMs.markdownDescription: Silence threshold in milliseconds to trigger a split.

vibefox.vadMinDurationMs.markdownDescription: Minimum audio segment duration in milliseconds before allowing a split.

vibefox.vadSilenceThreshold.markdownDescription: Volume amplitude threshold (16-bit PCM absolute average) below which audio is treated as silent. Default 350. Lower it (e.g. 150-200) for quiet microphones.

vibefox.llmCorrectionEnabled.markdownDescription: Enable LLM post-processing correction on transcribed text to add proper punctuation, fix identifier spellings based on vocabulary hints, and remove verbal fillers.

enumDescriptions: Use a custom chat completion URL
vibefox.llmCorrectionProvider.markdownDescription: The LLM provider to use for text correction. If auto, maps to the active transcription provider.

vibefox.llmCorrectionModel.markdownDescription: Optional model name override for LLM correction (e.g. llama-3.3-70b-versatile, gpt-4o-mini). If empty, standard default model is selected based on the provider.

vibefox.llmCorrectionPrompt.default: 你是一个编程语音转文字后处理器。用户用中文口述编程意图。请修正转写文本中的错误标点符号（在语气停顿处补充逗号、句号），修复代码标识符拼写错误（参考词表中的名字进行匹配替换，保证拼写和大小写完全一致），并去除口语填充词（如：啊、嗯、那个、就是说）。不要改变用户原意，直接输出修正后的文本，不要带有任何解释、问候或Markdown包裹符号。
vibefox.llmCorrectionPrompt.markdownDescription: The system prompt sent to the LLM to guide text correction.

vibefox.llmCorrectionCustomEndpoint.markdownDescription: The custom chat completions endpoint URL when llmCorrectionProvider is set to custom.

vibefox.developerModeEnabled.markdownDescription: Enable Developer Mode rule-based formatting (e.g. converting 'dot ts' to '.ts', converting 'camel case user profile' to 'userProfile', and converting spoken punctuation words).
